eligibility: Must be a pupil or ex-pupil of Tawa College

eligibility: Must be a current student
Experiencing unexpected or exceptional hardship

One successful grant per financial year

Not for primarily commercial purposes
Within Tauranga City Council boundaries

Cannot receive both scholarships
Completed Whakapapa Form
